channel.copyright: זכויות יוצרים ‎\xc2\xa9 2026 Microsoft. כל הזכויות שמורות. לא ניתן להשתמש בתוצאות XML אלה, לשכפל אותן או לשדר אותן בכל אמצעי או לכל מטרה למעט לעיבוד תוצאות Bing בתוך צובר RSS לשימושך האישי שאינו מסחרי. כל שימוש אחר בתוצאות אלה מחייב אישור מפורש בכתב מ- Microsoft Corporation. על-ידי גישה לדף אינטרנט זה או שימוש בתוצאות אלה בכל אופן שהוא, אתה מביע את הסכמתך להיות כפוף להגבלות לעיל.

item.title: Majestic Labs Announces Prometheus: The First AI Server Purpose-Built to Break the Memory Wall
item.description: Majestic’s memory-first AI servers combine efficiency, ease of programming, and a groundbreaking memory system to collapse racks of standard servers into a single Majestic server SAN FRANCISCO & TEL ...

item.title: Majestic Labs launches with $100M to build memory-dense AI servers
item.description: Artificial intelligence infrastructure startup Majestic Labs Inc. launched today with $100 million in initial funding. The company raised the bulk of the capital, $71 million, through a Series A round ...

item.title: Majestic Labs raises $100m for its all in one servers designed to eliminate the memory wall
item.description: An AI server startup founded by former Google and Meta executives emerged from stealth earlier this month following a $100 million Series A funding round. Israel-based Majestic Labs claims to have ...

item.title: Majestic Labs emerges with $100M to solve AI memory bottleneck and rival Nvidia's servers
item.description: Majestic Labs has emerged from stealth with $100 million in funding, a $10 million seed round, and $90 million Series A round. The company's cofounder and CEO, Ofer Schacham, is an Israeli who lived ...

item.title: Majestic Labs emerges with $100M to solve AI memory bottleneck and rival Nvidia's servers
item.description: Ofer Schacham, a veteran chip expert, is tackling "Altman's Law" by solving the memory crisis in AI data centers. His startup, Majestic Labs, just raised $100M to take on industry giant Nvidia.

item.title: Former Google, Meta executives raise $100 million for high-capacity AI servers startup
item.description: Three former Meta and Google silicon executives on Monday announced they've raised $100 million to build technology they say will reduce cloud companies' spend on data center buildouts. Majestic Labs ...

item.title: Former Google and Meta engineers build memory-first AI server to challenge Nvidia's GPU dominance
item.description: First look: A new generation of artificial intelligence systems is exposing a limitation that raw computing power alone cannot solve. As models scale into the trillions of parameters, memory – its ...
